name: ldmux
description: Local dmux - Multi-agent orchestrator for Windows Terminal

scripts.build:all: npm run web:build && npm run build
scripts.build:bundle: npm run web:build && ncc build src/index.ts -o release --minify --source-map && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');fs.cpSync('src/gui/public','release/public',{recursive:true});fs.chmodSync('release/index.js',0o755);for(const f of fs.readdirSync('release',{recursive:true})){if(typeof f==='string'&&f.endsWith('.d.ts'))fs.rmSync(p.join('release',f))}"
